name: kjumpingcube
description: Conquer all squares on a board either by occupying an empty square or conquering your opponent's. A maxed out square will distribute its points around it, causing empty squares to be occupied. Watch out for chain reactions! This game is part of the KDE Games suite. USAGE (from the command line): kdegames -h (shows the list of games) kdegames $GAME (launches the selected game)
